session.user:
Change to repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci
Report all output. Only report the final status - passed or failed, and if failed which checks failed.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command in the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute make fast-ci to run fast CI checks

session.assistant:
**Final Status: PASSED**
All checks passed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1680 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: Reference documentation up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5848 passed in 12.39s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.41s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.78s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md pairing**: 19 files checked, 0 violations
